Package laba.commands

package laba.commands
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    laba
     
    laba.data
     
    laba.exceptions
     
    laba.sorter
     
    laba.utility
     
  • Class
    Description
    AddCommand
    Adds a new item to the collection
    ClearCommand
    Clears the collection
    Command
     
    ExecuteScriptCommand
    Executes commands from the file
    ExitCommand
     
    HelpCommand
    A command that outputs a description of each command
    HistoryCommand
    Shows the history of the last 9 teams
    InfoCommand
    The command that shows information about the collection
    PrintAscendingCommand
    A command that outputs the elements of a collection in ascending order
    PrintDescendingCommand
    A command that outputs the elements of a collection in descending order
    PrintFieldAscendingChapterCommand
    A command that outputs the values of the Chapter class field of all collection elements in ascending order
    RemoveCommand
    The command deletes a collection item by its ID
    RemoveGreaterCommand
    The command deletes all items from the collection that exceed the specified value.
    RemoveLowerCommand
    The command deletes all items from the collection that are less than the specified value.
    SaveCommand
    The command saves the collection to an xml file.
    ShowCommand
    The command shows information about each item in the collection
    UpdateCommand
    The command updates information about a collection item whose id is equal to the specified one.
